title: mentha × verticillata var. pluriglobula
intro: Mentha × verticillata var. pluriglobula, also known as the bush mint or variegated mint, is a type of hybrid mint plant that is commonly found in gardens and landscaping. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as an antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and digestive aid, which makes it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Mentha × verticillata var. pluriglobula include reducing nausea and vomiting, alleviating digestive issues, and relieving pain and inflammation. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
